findings.title: Open Redirect Vulnerability
findings.description: The function accepts an arbitrary redirect_url parameter without validation and passes it directly to redirect(). This allows attackers to redirect users to malicious external sites by providing URLs like 'http://evil.com'.
findings.fix: Validate the redirect URL against a whitelist of allowed domains or paths. Check if the URL is relative or belongs to your application domain before redirecting.
